case_title: MAXINE L. ANGELL VS. SUSAN WOOLLEY KATZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2021 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 7-13-21)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANGELL, MAXINE L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KATZ, SUSAN WOOLLEY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,645.00, DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH UNREDACTED COPIES OF THE TEST RECORDS FORMS BY AUGUST 31, 2021. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY ANGELL, MAXINE L. AS TO DEFENDANT KATZ, SUSAN WOOLLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT KATZ, SUSAN WOOLLEY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MAXINE L. ANGELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SUSAN WOOLEY KATZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COURT RETAINS DEFENDANT'S OCR LETTER AND HIPA POSITION STATEMENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $95.00) SERVED JUN-02-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KATZ, SUSAN WOOLLEY
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANGELL, MAXINE L. AS TO DEFENDANT KATZ, SUSAN WOOLLEY
